framework.name: OpenClaw
framework.description: Hub-and-spoke self-hosted agent platform — Gateway/Runtime split architecture. 40+ messaging channels, 75+ tools, Docker sandbox, layered memory (workspace → vector → knowledge graph), plugin SDK with 13 lifecycle hooks. Built in TypeScript monorepo.

modules.name: Gateway Server
modules.description: Central daemon — Express + WebSocket JSON-RPC, OpenAI-compatible HTTP API. Manages channel connections, routing, cron, browser control, node management, health probes.

modules.name: Agent Runtime
modules.description: AI agent brain — PI Embedded Runner with ReAct loop, model selection, tool execution, system prompt construction, sandboxing, skills, subagents, context compaction.

modules.name: Channel Hub
modules.description: Unified message adapter for 40+ channels (Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, iMessage, LINE, IRC, QQ, Feishu, etc.). Each implements normalize/send/monitor/onboard.

modules.name: Auto-Reply Pipeline
modules.description: Message processing: dispatch → directives → commands → queue → delivery → approval. Routes inbound messages to correct agent based on 7-tier priority rules.

modules.name: Tool Registry
modules.description: 75+ tools: exec, browser (Playwright/CDP), web search, memory, message, cron, canvas, nodes, diffs, file ops. TypeScript type-safe tool definitions with parameter schemas.

modules.name: Docker Sandbox
modules.description: Container-based execution isolation. Configurable modes: off/non-main/all. Cell Isolation for local node execution on Mac/Linux/Raspberry Pi.

modules.name: Memory Host SDK
modules.description: Layered memory: workspace files (MEMORY.md, USER.md, SOUL.md), SQLite facts.db, PGVector/LanceDB vector search, knowledge graphs (3K+ facts), semantic recall.

modules.name: Background Task Control
modules.description: SQLite-backed durable task plane: cron scheduler, task registry, executor, audit, ownership tracking. Tasks survive restarts with retry and delivery guarantees.

modules.name: Hook Event Bus
modules.description: 13 lifecycle hook points: before/after tool execution, before/after agent response, session lifecycle, error handling, shutdown. Plugin SDK for custom extensions.

modules.name: Plugin SDK
modules.description: Type-safe extension API: tool plugins, provider plugins, channel plugins, MCP mediation. Auth profiles with failover chains. Hot-reload via openclaw.json (JSON5 + Zod validation).

modules.name: Security Layer
modules.description: Multi-layer defense: exec approval workflow, tool allow/deny policies, SSRF protection, content sanitization, SecretRef credential management, timing-safe auth.

metadata.description: Any messaging platform sends normalized event to Gateway
Gateway routes message through auto-reply pipeline with 7-tier priority matching
Pipeline dispatches to Agent Runtime: model selection → system prompt → ReAct loop
Agent invokes tool; Registry resolves and executes with parameter validation
Shell commands and browser automation executed inside Docker container
Agent reads workspace files + vector search; writes facts and conversation summaries
13 hook points fire at each lifecycle stage; plugins react and can modify behavior
Gateway schedules cron jobs; Background Task Control executes and persists results
Scheduled task fires → spawns isolated agent session → delivers result back to channel
Agent returns formatted response; Gateway delivers back through originating channel
Plugin SDK registers custom tools into Tool Registry at startup
Plugins subscribe to lifecycle hooks via Plugin SDK
Security Layer checks tool allow/deny policies before Tool Registry executes
Security policies control sandbox mode and isolation level
Hook events flow to Security Layer for audit logging and anomaly detection

phases.name: Message Ingestion & Routing
phases.description: Inbound message from any channel → normalize → dispatch through auto-reply pipeline → route to correct agent

steps.description: Channel plugin normalizes platform-specific event into unified internal format
Gateway validates auth, applies rate limiting, resolves agent routing rules
7-tier priority matching: force → exact → prefix → regex → tags → default → fallback

phases.name: Agent Execution (ReAct Loop)
phases.description: Agent Runtime executes ReAct loop: Think → Act → Observe → Repeat until response complete

steps.description: Select optimal LLM provider based on task: chat→fast, coding→premium, reasoning→reasoning model
Load workspace files + vector search for relevant past conversations
Construct system prompt with identity files; model decides: respond or call tool
If tool call: invoke from 75+ tools (exec, browser, search, memory, etc.)
If command exec: run inside Docker sandbox with Cell Isolation
Before/after each tool execution, hook events fire; plugins may modify behavior
Model produces final text response; loop terminates

phases.name: Response Delivery & Persistence
phases.description: Deliver agent response back through channel, save memory, update audit log

steps.description: Gateway delivers formatted response back through originating channel plugin
Summarize key insights; store facts in facts.db; update vector index
Background Task Control logs execution audit trail for debugging and compliance
